name: Grimage Wall Breaker
description: Take on the challenge in Grimace Wall Destroyer! Control your grimace character and focus on destroying walls by clicking to speed up. Navigate through levels, smashing walls strategically to reach your destination. With each level posing new obstacles and puzzles, showcase your skills and determination to conquer all challenges. Can you demolish every wall and emerge victorious? Website Developer <a href='https://www.game-plays.com/'>https://www.game-plays.com/</a>
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: Action, Click, destroying, Grimace, Grimace Shake, run, running, unity games, WebGL
